title: Freshly Fried American Chicken Skewers
description: A grassy and crunchy American dish featuring cardamom, infused oil, and paleo friendly ingredients, perfect for a show off dinner party.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, cardamom powder, paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the flour mixture.
Thread the coated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the infused oil onto the chicken pieces.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20 minutes.
Increase the oven temperature to 425 degrees Fahrenheit and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the skewers from the oven and brush with lemon juice.
Sprinkle chopped parsley over the chicken pieces and serve hot.
